title: Right to Happiness
writer: Fritz Friedmann-Frederich, Fred Hildenbrand, Hermann Müller
actors: Richard Tauber, Petra Unkel, S.Z. Sakall
plot: Herr Hoffmann (tenor Richard Tauber) is a famous widowed singer with a young daughter to raise, aided by his faithful manager. They meet a girl and Hoffmann falls for her, reluctant to believe that in fact she is in love with a mu...
